heading: Learn More
body:
To learn how to define a MongoDB Search index to meet your MongoDB Search query needs, see [create a MongoDB Search index](ref-create-index).

To learn how to add an index to your cluster, see [Create a MongoDB Search index](create-fts-index).

To learn more about the available index configuration options, see the following reference pages:

- [Process Data with Analyzers](analyzers-ref)

- [Define Field Mappings](fts-field-mappings)

- [storedSource](fts-stored-source-definition)

- [Synonym](synonyms-ref)
